title: AST Vehicle Collision: Fairbanks, AK [AK25082984]

The at-fault driver, who was making a left turn on a green light, failed to yield to an oncoming vehicle. No injuries were reported, and all occupants declined medical attention from EMS.

title: AST Missing Person: Palmer [AK25082895]
summary: On 08/17/2025 at approximately 1333 hours, AST received a report of an elderly female with dementia as missing. MATSAR, Big Lake EMS, and Fire were able to locate her safely. She was transported to Mat-Su Regional for precautionary medical evaluation.

title: AST Motor Vehicle Colision: Fairbanks [AK25082573]
summary: On August 16, 2025, at approximately 1344 hours, the Alaska State Troopers responded to a single vehicle collision in the area of Farmers Loop Rd. Investigation revealed that the driver was driving too fast for road conditions before leaving the roadway and impacting a tree.

title: AST Probation Violation: Fairbanks [AK25082667]
summary: On August 16, 2025, at approximately 1916 hours, State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle for a moving violation. Investigation revealed that the driver, Tana Weckwerth, 24YOA of North Pole, was violating her probation. Tana was remanded to the Fairbanks Correctional Center.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Commercial Fishing Closed Area: Kenai [AK25071747]
summary: On 7/21/2025 at approximately 1142 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers were patrolling the Kenai Beach. Bruce Manley age 73 from Kasilof was contacted Commercial Dip netting. Investigation revealed Manley was fishing in a closed area. A mandatory court appearance was filed with Kenai Courthouse.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Deceased Person: Fairbanks [AK25082555]
summary: On August 16, 2025, at 12:59 hours Alaska State Trooper received a report of a deceased person. The investigation revealed that Darren Bazilwich, age 30 of Fairbanks was deceased. The investigation is ongoing, next of kin has been notified.
